tasks.title: Promote + apply the three core Motion Graphic tables (motion_graphics, chat_turns, block_snapshots)
tasks.dod: Staged migrations 01/02/03 are promoted to live apps/api/src/db/migrations/ (058–060), apply cleanly on startup and revert cleanly via their .down.sql, with the data-model indexes + FKs in place.

tasks.title: Promote + apply the storyboard_block_media alter (motion_graphic kind, nullable file_id, snapshot FK)
tasks.dod: Staged migration 04 is promoted to live migrations/ (061), adds the motion_graphic ENUM value + motion_graphic_snapshot_id FK and relaxes file_id to NULL; applies and reverts cleanly with existing block-media rows intact.

tasks.title: Add @anthropic-ai/sdk dependency, APP_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY config, and a module-singleton Anthropic client
tasks.dod: @anthropic-ai/sdk is added to apps/api, APP_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is Zod-validated in config.ts (with model id default claude-opus-4-8), and a singleton client module exports a configured instance; api boots with the key set and fails validation when absent.

tasks.title: Scaffold the motion-graphic web-editor feature slice + route + page shell
tasks.dod: apps/web-editor/src/features/motion-graphic/ exists with api.ts, types.ts (wire types mirroring openapi.yaml), components/, hooks/, runtime/ placeholder; a protected /motion-graphics route is registered in main.tsx and renders an empty page shell.

tasks.title: motionGraphic.repository — raw-SQL CRUD for graphics, chat turns, and block snapshots
tasks.dod: Repository functions (insert/read-with-chat/list-by-owner-cursor/update-code+version/rename/append-turn/copy-turns, plus atomic snapshot+block-media insert and the snapshot-join read) execute against real MySQL using the data-model indexes; the snapshot is a frozen copy independent of the source.

tasks.title: motionGraphic.service — CRUD, ownership filtering, and the ready-state invariant
tasks.dod: Service exposes list/get/createFromVerdict/rename/appendTurn/duplicate; every read/write is owner-filtered and a non-owner is answered as NotFoundError (existence hiding); verdict mapping ready→code+version, failed→keep last working; duplicate seeds chat as live re-runnable turns. Unit tests cover the ownership + ready-state branches.

tasks.title: motionGraphic.cost.service — estimate + server re-validation mirror
tasks.dod: Service computes a server-side estimate and re-validates a client-supplied acknowledgedCost under the same exact-match rule as storyboardPipeline.cost.service, throwing a GateError (motion_graphic.estimate_revalidation_failed, 422) on mismatch; unit tests cover match + mismatch.

tasks.title: motionGraphicGuardrail.service — pre-generation prompt guardrail + runtime allowlist
tasks.dod: Service exposes a pre-generation check that refuses exfiltration/subversion-intent prompts (throws GateError motion_graphic.prompt_rejected) and a minimal reject-by-default import/runtime allowlist (render runtime + schema lib) per ADR-0007; unit tests cover refuse + allow.

tasks.title: motionGraphicAuthoring.service — Anthropic streaming proxy with SSE framing
tasks.dod: Service builds the system prompt + Remotion runtime contract (+ chat history for refine), runs length(AC-05)/cost(AC-11)/guardrail gates BEFORE opening the stream (failures throw, surfaced as JSON 4xx), then streams Claude tokens and emits the token/done/error SSE frame protocol (ADR-0003) with prompt-caching of the fixed prefix.

tasks.title: Motion Graphic CRUD routes + controller (list, get, create, rename, turns, duplicate)
tasks.dod: motionGraphic.routes.ts + controller implement the six non-streaming operations per openapi.yaml (Zod body validation, auth, owner→404); routes mounted in index.ts; integration tests assert the AC outcomes incl. AC-07 404-as-not-exist.

tasks.title: Generation + refinement SSE endpoints (POST /generate, POST /{id}/refine)
tasks.dod: The two authoring endpoints run the pre-stream gates (length→422 description_too_short for /generate, cost→422 estimate_revalidation_failed, guardrail→422 prompt_rejected) returning JSON 4xx before the stream opens, then open text/event-stream relaying token/done/error frames; integration tests assert each 422 mode and a happy stream.

tasks.title: Attach-to-block endpoint — server-authored frozen snapshot
tasks.dod: POST /storyboards/{draftId}/blocks/{blockId}/media/motion-graphic reads the graphic (owner→404), enforces ready-state (non-ready→422 motion_graphic.not_ready, AC-08), writes the frozen snapshot + block-media row (AC-04/AC-10) and returns BlockMediaMotionGraphic; integration tests cover ready, not-ready, and non-owner paths.

tasks.title: Motion Graphics list page — empty state, rename, duplicate actions
tasks.dod: The /motion-graphics page lists owner graphics (title + duration + status) newest-first with an empty state, and offers rename + duplicate actions wired to the API; reuses the existing list/card styling tokens and the generate-wizard slice conventions.

tasks.title: Browser runtime — in-browser transpile (Sucrase) + mount authored TSX into <Player>
tasks.dod: runtime/ transpiles authored TSX with a Sucrase-class transpiler and dynamically mounts the component into a runtime composition wrapper fed to Remotion's <Player> (reusing the PreviewPanel pattern), rendering a full-canvas live preview within the ≤1500 ms budget; a non-compiling component yields a clean fails-to-run verdict; smoke test mounts a fixture.

tasks.title: Determinism enforcement — author-time AST scan + runtime shim
tasks.dod: An AST scan rejects Date.now()/new Date()/Math.random()/performance.now() (and off-allowlist imports) before a graphic can reach ready, with a precise reason; a runtime shim freezes those sources during execution (ADR-0006). Unit tests cover deterministic-pass + each non-deterministic-reject case.

tasks.title: Authoring view — duration input, generate SSE flow, create-verdict persist
tasks.dod: The authoring view renders the duration-seconds input above the chat and the full-canvas preview alongside; submitting a description shows the cost estimate + confirm, opens the /generate SSE stream, runs transpile+determinism on the assembled code, then persists the verdict via POST /motion-graphics (ready→preview+ready with auto-title sized to duration; failed→error in chat, AC-06). The too-short message (AC-05) surfaces inline.

tasks.title: Authoring view — refine SSE flow + append-turn verdict persist (keep last working)
tasks.dod: Sending a refinement in the chat shows cost+confirm, opens the /{id}/refine SSE stream, runs transpile+determinism, then persists via POST /{id}/turns: ready→appends the exchange and refreshes the preview (AC-03); failed→records the error in chat and keeps the last working preview/version unchanged (AC-14).

tasks.title: Attach-to-storyboard UI — block-media picker extension + motion_graphic media render
tasks.dod: The storyboard block-media picker lets a Creator pick a ready graphic and attach it (calls the attach endpoint), shows the attached motion_graphic among the block's media (rendered via the runtime preview), and surfaces the AC-08 not-ready refusal message; reuses SceneBlockNode media-thumbnail conventions.

tasks.title: Guardrail conformance test suite over the curated red-team prompt set
tasks.dod: A conformance suite runs the Security-Lead-owned red-team prompt set (spec §8 OQ-4) through the guardrail and asserts ≥95% refusal (§6 NFR) plus a low false-positive rate on benign prompts, with the set + threshold checked in as fixtures. (Blocked on OQ-4 — due before plan-tests.)

tasks.title: CI frame-diff parity on the fixed fixture set + determinism enforcement E2E
tasks.dod: A CI frame-diff check renders a fixed fixture set and asserts preview parity (spec §6 NFR Render parity), and an end-to-end test asserts a non-deterministic graphic never reaches ready state; no per-user-graphic runtime frame-diff is introduced.
